failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    c.id AS comment_id,
    c.annotation,
    c.profile_id
FROM comment c
JOIN publication p ON c.publication_id = p.id
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE pr.username = 'broxadasinistra'
  AND (
    c.annotation ILIKE '%racista%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%racismo%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%preconceito%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%homofob%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%transfob%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%misogin%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%machist%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%religi%'
  )
ORDER BY c.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: canceling statement due to statement timeout

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation,
    c.published_at
FROM comment c
WHERE c.publication_id IN (
    SELECT p.id
    FROM publication p
    JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
    WHERE pr.username = 'broxadasinistra'
)
AND (
    c.annotation ILIKE '%racista%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%racismo%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%preconceito%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%homofob%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%transfob%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%misogin%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%machist%' OR
    c.annotation ILIKE '%religi%'
)
ORDER BY c.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
